introText: Explore federal VA benefits and Alabama-specific programs for senior veterans. Learn about Aid & Attendance, VA pension, health care, and state veterans benefits.

aidAndAttendance.eligibility: Veterans needing aid of another person for daily activities
aidAndAttendance.description: Enhanced VA pension benefit for veterans who need help with daily living activities.

vaPension.description: Monthly benefit for low-income wartime veterans age 65+ or with permanent disability.

stateBenefits.name: Alabama Veterans Property Tax Exemption
stateBenefits.description: Alabama offers property tax exemptions for qualifying veterans.

stateBenefits.name: Alabama Veterans Education Benefits
stateBenefits.description: State education benefits for veterans and dependents.

propertyTaxExemption: Alabama provides property tax exemptions for disabled veterans. Exemption amounts vary based on disability rating.

caregiverSupport.description: Support, training, and respite for caregivers of veterans

faqs.question: What VA benefits are available to senior veterans in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Senior veterans in Alabama may qualify for VA health care, pension, Aid & Attendance, home care, and state-specific benefits including property tax exemptions.

faqs.question: How do I apply for VA Aid & Attendance in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Apply through the VA by submitting VA Form 21-2680. You can apply online at va.gov, by mail, or with help from a Veterans Service Organization.

aidAndAttendance.eligibility: Veterans needing aid of another person for daily activities
aidAndAttendance.description: Enhanced VA pension benefit for veterans who need help with daily living activities.

vaPension.description: Monthly benefit for low-income wartime veterans age 65+ or with permanent disability.

stateBenefits.name: Wisconsin Veterans Property Tax Exemption
stateBenefits.description: Wisconsin offers property tax exemptions for qualifying veterans.

stateBenefits.name: Wisconsin Veterans Education Benefits
stateBenefits.description: State education benefits for veterans and dependents.

propertyTaxExemption: Wisconsin provides property tax exemptions for disabled veterans. Exemption amounts vary based on disability rating.

caregiverSupport.description: Support, training, and respite for caregivers of veterans

faqs.question: What VA benefits are available to senior veterans in Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Senior veterans in Wisconsin may qualify for VA health care, pension, Aid & Attendance, home care, and state-specific benefits including property tax exemptions.

faqs.question: How do I apply for VA Aid & Attendance in Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Apply through the VA by submitting VA Form 21-2680. You can apply online at va.gov, by mail, or with help from a Veterans Service Organization.
